licence.title: Licence in Urban Sciences
admission: Baccalauréat (scientific, mathematics or technical-math streams recommended)
Admission through the national university orientation platform
Minimum average threshold set yearly by the Ministry of Higher Education
Basic proficiency in French for technical coursework
objectives: Build foundational knowledge in urban geography, planning and engineering
Develop cartographic, analytical and technical drawing skills
Introduce GIS and digital tools used in urban professions
Prepare students for specialization at the Master's level

master.title: Master in Urban Management & Techniques
admission: Licence in Urbanisme, Génie Urbain, Architecture, Geography or related field
Ranking based on Licence average and specialty compatibility
Faculty interview or file review depending on track
Available specialties: Urbanisme, Gestion des Villes, Génie Urbain
objectives: Deepen expertise in a chosen urban specialty
Conduct independent applied research on real territorial issues
Produce a defensible thesis with practical relevance to Algerian cities
